controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short title and commencement
(1) These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: (2) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as a 'rcb')
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as a 'RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as a 'rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio
controls.control_description:
(2) The restrictions on further financial accommodation to wilful defaulters and provisions
regarding large defaulters contained in these Directions, shall apply to all entities
regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition
of 'lender' as provided in these Directions or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and lar
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) All the expressions used in these Directions shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks
- Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025 or the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve Bank
of India or the Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - treatment of wilful defaulters and lar

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented by a rcb in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender: explanation 1: if the wilful defaulter is a company, another company will be deemed to be associated with it
controls.control_description:
Penal and other measures against wilful defaulters
(1) The penal measures mentioned below shall be implemented by a RCB in the case of
any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:
Explanation 1: If the wilful defaulter is a company, another company will be deemed to be
associated with it, if that company is -
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented by a rcb in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender: explanation 1: if the wilful defaulter is a company, another company will be deemed to be associated with it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be associated
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person, all entities in which he is
associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted by the rcb to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated
controls.control_description:
(i) No additional credit facility shall be granted by the RCB to the wilful defaulter or
any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted by the rcb to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective for a period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the list of wilful defaulters by the lenders
controls.control_description:
(ii) The bar on additional credit facility to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which
the wilful defaulter is associated shall be effective for a period of one year after the
name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of Wilful Defaulters by
the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective for a period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the list of wilful defaulters by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted by the rcb for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period of
controls.control_description:
(iii) No credit facility shall be granted by the RCB for floating of new ventures to the
wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period
of five years after the name of wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of
Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted by the rcb for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the stipulations contained in the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(iv) The restructuring of wilful defaulters or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is
associated shall be as per the stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of India
(Rural Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the stipulations contained in the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure cease to be applicable on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
Provided that the penal provisions mentioned above shall cease to be applicable on the
associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cease to be applicable on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals: explanation: the res
controls.control_description:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Large Defaulters
(1) A RCB shall submit information in Annex I to all credit information companies
(CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
Explanation: The resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall
mean any of the following Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals: explanation: the res

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included
controls.control_description:
(2) For calculating the threshold of ₹1 crore, the unapplied interest, if any, shall also
be included.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included

controls.control_objective: To ensure relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed
controls.control_description:
In the case of suit-filed accounts, the threshold shall relate to the amount for
which the suits have been filed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership, under the ibc or the
controls.control_description:
Treatment of accounts where resolution is done under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code (IBC) / resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve
Bank
(1) The penal measures as detailed in Paragraph 4 shall not be applicable to such
entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving
change in ownership, under the IBC or the resolution framework Directions issued by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership, under the ibc or the

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions, and
guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: i
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
(1) The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
(1) For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filled as 'jan24' 2
controls.control_description:
Reporting Cycle
Alpha Numeric
5 Month for which the data is reported
The reporting cycle data for month of January 2024, should be filled as 'JAN24' 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filled as 'jan24' 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure to include reporting member code as assigned by cics
controls.control_description:
Member ID Alpha Numeric
10 The field is required to include Reporting Member Code as assigned by CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to include reporting member code as assigned by cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain the name of the member who is reporting the data
controls.control_description:
Member Name
Character 200 Name of the member
Must contain the name of the member who is reporting the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain the name of the member who is reporting the data

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fed
controls.control_description:
Member Branch
Character 30 Branch name of the member
Name of the branch should be fed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 2 characters for individual borrowers and 4 characters for non- individual
controls.control_description:
Borrower Name
Alpha Numeric
1000 Minimum length of the Name should be 2 characters for individual borrowers and 4 characters for non- individual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 2 characters for individual borrowers and 4 characters for non- individual

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 10 characters
controls.control_description:
Borrower PAN
Alpha Numeric
Permanent Account Number (PAN) as defined by the Income
10 Must be 10 characters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 10 characters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be letters, followed by four numbers, and followed by a letter
controls.control_description: The first five characters must be letters, followed by four numbers, and followed by a letter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be letters, followed by four numbers, and followed by a letter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a numeric value outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off) 10
controls.control_description:
Outstanding Amount
Numeric 8 Should be a Numeric Value
Outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off)
10.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a numeric value outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off) 10

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filled up as 'mar00'
controls.control_description: The date of classification 'march 2000' should be filled up as 'MAR00'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filled up as 'mar00'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fed in abbreviated form e
controls.control_description: Other Member Character 1000 The names may be fed in abbreviated form e.g., BOB for Bank of Baroda, SBI for State Bank of India etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fed in abbreviated form e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated
controls.control_description: The names of other lenders from whom the borrower has availed credit facility should be indicated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 2 characters name of director/promoter
controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter Name
Character 1000 Minimum length of name should be 2 characters
Name of Director/Promoter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 2 characters name of director/promoter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 8 din of the director/ promoter
controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter DIN
Alpha Numeric 8 DIN Number length should be 8
DIN of the Director/ Promoter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 8 din of the director/ promoter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a minimum of 10 characters
controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter PAN
Alpha Numeric 10 Must be a minimum of 10 characters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a minimum of 10 characters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 2 characters full name of the guarantor should be indicated
controls.control_description:
Guarantor Name Character 1000 Minimum length of name should be 2 characters
Full name of the Guarantor should be indicated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 2 characters full name of the guarantor should be indicated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a minimum of 10 characters
controls.control_description: Guarantor PAN Alpha Numeric 10 Must be a minimum of 10 characters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a minimum of 10 characters
